# HHZ Respiratory Review

> India's independent respiratory-equipment reference for oxygen concentrators, CPAP, and BiPAP devices sold in India. Products are scored against a published rubric. No sponsored placement and no brand veto.

HHZ currently tracks 93 oxygen concentrator product records, 78 oxygen concentrator reviews, 26 CPAP/BiPAP product records, 26 CPAP/BiPAP reviews, 59 comparison records, and 59 written comparison pages. The guide library has 15 buyer guides and the clinical library has 61 educational explainers.

Home Medix models in the catalogue: Home Medix HM-KX 10 LPM, Home Medix HM-KV 5 LPM, Home Medix HM-BV-30 BiPAP, Home Medix HM-CV-20 Auto CPAP. They are scored in the same product and comparison framework as Philips, Oxymed, ResMed, Nidek, DeVilbiss, BMC, Yuwell, and other brands.

## Editorial policies

- [About HHZ](https://homehealthzone.com/about/): what HHZ covers and how the rubric is applied
- [Methodology](https://homehealthzone.com/methodology/): scoring methodology and testing protocol
- [Editorial policy](https://homehealthzone.com/editorial-policy/): independence, loaners, sponsorship, and corrections
- [Correction policy](https://homehealthzone.com/correction-policy/): timestamped corrections with original wording preserved
- [Contact](https://homehealthzone.com/contact/)

## Top 5 category rankings

- [Top 5 10 LPM Oxygen Concentrators in India (2026) — HHZ](https://homehealthzone.com/top-5/10-lpm-oxygen-concentrators/): HHZ editorial top 5 10 LPM high-flow oxygen concentrators for India 2026: Home Medix HM-KX, Oxymed 10 Dual Flow, Nidek Nuvo 10, DeVilbiss 10 LPM, Fitmate 10 LPM.
- [Top 5 5 LPM Oxygen Concentrators in India (2026) — HHZ](https://homehealthzone.com/top-5/5-lpm-oxygen-concentrators/): HHZ editorial top 5 5 LPM oxygen concentrators for India 2026: Philips EverFlo, AirSep Visionaire 5, DeVilbiss Compact 525, Nidek Nuvo Lite, Home Medix HM-KV.
- [Top 5 BiPAP Machines in India (2026) — HHZ](https://homehealthzone.com/top-5/bipap-machines/): HHZ editorial top 5 BiPAP machines for India 2026: ResMed Lumis 150, Lumis 100, AirCurve 10 V Auto, Home Medix HM-BV-30, Philips DreamStation BiPAP AVAPS.
- [Top 5 CPAP Machines in India (2026) — HHZ](https://homehealthzone.com/top-5/cpap-machines/): HHZ editorial top 5 CPAP machines for India 2026: ResMed AirSense 10 AutoSet, AirSense 11 AutoSet, Breas Z2 Auto, ResMed AirMini, Home Medix HM-CV-20.
- [Top 5 Portable Oxygen Concentrators in India (2026) — HHZ](https://homehealthzone.com/top-5/portable-oxygen-concentrators/): HHZ editorial top 5 portable oxygen concentrators for India 2026: Inogen One G5, SeQual Eclipse 5, Invacare Platinum Mobile, Philips SimplyGo Mini, Caire Freestyle Comfort 5.

## Buyer's guides

- [10 LPM oxygen concentrator spec comparison in India](https://homehealthzone.com/guides/10-lpm-oxygen-concentrator-spec-comparison-india/): A buyer-facing comparison of 10 LPM oxygen concentrators sold in India, with flow range, purity, weight, noise, power draw, OPI, and when a high-flow unit is actually justified.
- [5 LPM oxygen concentrator spec comparison in India](https://homehealthzone.com/guides/5-lpm-oxygen-concentrator-spec-comparison-india/): A table-first comparison of common 5 LPM oxygen concentrators sold in India, covering flow range, purity, weight, noise, power draw, OPI, certifications, and service-relevant trade-offs.
- [5 LPM vs 10 LPM concentrator: which do I need?](https://homehealthzone.com/guides/5-lpm-vs-10-lpm/): A decision framework for choosing between a 5 LPM and a 10 LPM home oxygen concentrator in India, based on prescribed flow rate, cost, noise, and power draw.
- [BiPAP-ST devices in India: backup-rate machines compared](https://homehealthzone.com/guides/bipap-st-devices-india/): A practical guide to BiPAP-ST machines sold in India, explaining backup rate, indications, mode support, pressure ranges, and how ResMed, Philips, BMC, BPL, Oxymed, Deckmount, and Home Medix fit the market.
- [CPAP comfort features: EPR, Flex, C-Flex, and EPFlex](https://homehealthzone.com/guides/cpap-comfort-features-epr-flex-epflex/): A buyer's guide to CPAP exhalation-relief features across ResMed, Philips, BMC, Oxymed, Home Medix, and other Indian-market devices.
- [CPAP vs BiPAP: clinical decision tree](https://homehealthzone.com/guides/cpap-vs-bipap-indications/): When CPAP is the right therapy, when BiPAP is indicated instead, and how to read your sleep study to decide. Covers OSA severity, central apnea, complex sleep apnea, COPD overlap, and neuromuscular disease.
- [How to read an oxygen concentrator spec sheet](https://homehealthzone.com/guides/how-to-read-oxygen-concentrator-spec-sheet/): A field-by-field guide to oxygen concentrator specifications: flow, purity, OPI, sound level, power draw, pressure, altitude, warranty, certifications, and what claims to distrust.
- [Lightweight 5 LPM oxygen concentrators in India](https://homehealthzone.com/guides/lightweight-5-lpm-concentrators-india/): A comparison of lighter 5 LPM stationary oxygen concentrators in India, focused on caregiver handling, room-to-room movement, power draw, noise, and when weight should affect the buying decision.
- [Low-noise oxygen concentrators in India](https://homehealthzone.com/guides/low-noise-oxygen-concentrators-india/): A practical guide to low-noise oxygen concentrators for bedroom and night use, with published dB levels, placement rules, and why small dB differences matter.
- [Oxygen concentrator power backup guide for India](https://homehealthzone.com/guides/oxygen-concentrator-power-backup-india/): How to size a stabilizer, UPS, or inverter for an oxygen concentrator in India, with practical VA math for 5 LPM and 10 LPM machines.
- [Oxygen concentrator service network guide for India](https://homehealthzone.com/guides/oxygen-concentrator-service-network-india/): How to evaluate service access before buying an oxygen concentrator in India: authorized service, compressor swaps, sieve-bed replacement, warranty exclusions, loaner units, and pincode-level support.
- [Oxygen concentrator buyer's guide (India 2026)](https://homehealthzone.com/guides/oxygen-concentrators-buyers-guide-india/): A specs-first guide to choosing a home oxygen concentrator in India: how to match prescribed LPM to device rating, what purity claims to trust, what warranties usually exclude, and when renting beats buying.
- [Oxygen cylinder vs concentrator for home use](https://homehealthzone.com/guides/oxygen-cylinder-vs-concentrator/): Comparing oxygen cylinders and concentrators for long-term home use in India: reliability, purity, logistics, cost of ownership, safety, and when cylinders are still the right answer.
- [Portable vs stationary: choosing the right concentrator](https://homehealthzone.com/guides/portable-vs-stationary-concentrator/): How to choose between a portable oxygen concentrator (POC) and a stationary home unit: continuous flow vs pulse dose, battery life, flight rules for travel from India, and who each class actually suits.
- [TVAPS, AVAPS, and iVAPS devices in India](https://homehealthzone.com/guides/tvaps-avaps-ivaps-devices-india/): A guide to volume-assured bilevel modes in India: TVAPS, AVAPS, iVAPS, eVAPS, who needs them, what device specs to verify, and how available machines compare.

## Category hubs

- [Oxygen concentrators](https://homehealthzone.com/oxygen-concentrators/): oxygen concentrator catalogue, reviews, and category guides
- [CPAP machines](https://homehealthzone.com/cpap/): CPAP catalogue, reviews, and CPAP guidance
- [BiPAP machines](https://homehealthzone.com/bipap/): BiPAP catalogue, reviews, and NIV guidance
- [Head-to-head comparisons](https://homehealthzone.com/compare/): side-by-side product comparisons

## Full content corpus

- [llms-full.txt](https://homehealthzone.com/llms-full.txt): concatenated editorial corpus for LLM ingestion
- [sitemap-index.xml](https://homehealthzone.com/sitemap-index.xml): generated sitemap index for all public URLs
- [robots.txt](https://homehealthzone.com/robots.txt): AI crawlers are explicitly allowlisted
